lines.english: Why did Jenny want to leave the wedding reception?
lines.chinese: 珍妮为什么想离开婚宴？
lines.raw: Why did Jenny want to leave the wedding reception? | 珍妮为什么想离开婚宴？

lines.english: Jeremy Hampden has a large circle of friends and is very popular at parties.
lines.chinese: 杰里米·汉普顿交友甚广，在聚会上很受欢迎。
lines.raw: Jeremy Hampden has a large circle of friends and is very popular at parties. | 杰里米·汉普顿交友甚广，在聚会上很受欢迎。

lines.english: Everybody admires him for his great sense of humour--everybody, that is, except his six-year-old daughter, Jenny.
lines.chinese: 人人都羡慕他那绝妙的幽默感——人人都羡慕，除了他六岁的女儿珍妮。
lines.raw: Everybody admires him for his great sense of humour--everybody, that is, except his six-year-old daughter, Jenny. | 人人都羡慕他那绝妙的幽默感——人人都羡慕，除了他六岁的女儿珍妮。

lines.english: Recently, one of Jeremy's closest friends asked him to make a speech at a wedding reception.
lines.chinese: 最近，杰里米的一位最亲密的朋友请他在一个婚宴上讲话。
lines.raw: Recently, one of Jeremy's closest friends asked him to make a speech at a wedding reception. | 最近，杰里米的一位最亲密的朋友请他在一个婚宴上讲话。

lines.english: This is the sort of thing that Jeremy loves.
lines.chinese: 这正是杰里米喜欢做的事情。
lines.raw: This is the sort of thing that Jeremy loves. | 这正是杰里米喜欢做的事情。

lines.english: He prepared the speech carefully and went to the wedding with Jenny.
lines.chinese: 他精心准备了演讲稿，并和珍妮一起去了婚礼。
lines.raw: He prepared the speech carefully and went to the wedding with Jenny. | 他精心准备了演讲稿，并和珍妮一起去了婚礼。

lines.english: He had included a large number of funny stories in the speech and, of course, it was a great success.
lines.chinese: 他在演讲中讲了许多有趣的故事，当然，演讲非常成功。
lines.raw: He had included a large number of funny stories in the speech and, of course, it was a great success. | 他在演讲中讲了许多有趣的故事，当然，演讲非常成功。

lines.english: As soon as he had finished Jenny told him she wanted to go home.
lines.chinese: 演讲刚一结束，珍妮就告诉他她想回家。
lines.raw: As soon as he had finished Jenny told him she wanted to go home. | 演讲刚一结束，珍妮就告诉他她想回家。

lines.english: Jeremy was a little disappointed by this but he did as his daughter asked.
lines.chinese: 杰里米对此有点失望，但他还是照他女儿的要求做了。
lines.raw: Jeremy was a little disappointed by this but he did as his daughter asked. | 杰里米对此有点失望，但他还是照他女儿的要求做了。

lines.english: On the way home, he asked Jenny if she had enjoyed the speech.
lines.chinese: 在回家的路上，他问珍妮是否喜欢那个演讲。
lines.raw: On the way home, he asked Jenny if she had enjoyed the speech. | 在回家的路上，他问珍妮是否喜欢那个演讲。

lines.english: To his surprise she said she hadn't.
lines.chinese: 令他惊讶的是，她说她不喜欢。
lines.raw: To his surprise she said she hadn't. | 令他惊讶的是，她说她不喜欢。

lines.english: Jeremy asked her why this was so and she told him that she did not like to see so many people laughing at him!
lines.chinese: 杰里米问她为什么不喜欢，她告诉他她不喜欢看到那么多人嘲笑他！
lines.raw: Jeremy asked her why this was so and she told him that she did not like to see so many people laughing at him! | 杰里米问她为什么不喜欢，她告诉他她不喜欢看到那么多人嘲笑他！
